rationale: Educ. Code §43.058 governs ethics policies and conflicts of interest for the board of directors managing the permanent school fund. It is wholly unrelated to the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The board of directors shall adopt an ethics policy that provides standards of conduct relating to the management and investment of the permanent school fund in accordance with Section 43.0031(a).
_note: No textual or operational overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this ethics/conflict-of-interest statute.
